reviews.review_description:
I played the trial ver
sion....Nice effort.. But is it a multiplayer and not just AI opponent only?...If so, I'm IN!

I was looking for a foosball experience and decided to try this out.  Overall, it’s a very basic foosball experience.  Nothing over the top here in this app, as the models are blocky and the environment could use some work, but it plays good.  The physics feel right, controls are responsive, and being able to adjust the table height is very helpful.  Thank you to the developers for having this experience available and hope future updates continue to improve the experience.
